market_summary.notes: Market volatility remains high due to international oil price spikes (Brent >$107/bbl) and geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Global market sentiment is cautious amidst ongoing Fed policy concerns.

art_highlights: Whitney Biennial 2026 at the Whitney Museum (on view through August 23, 2026).
25th Biennale of Sydney: Rememory (on view through June 14, 2026).
Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (opened March 20, 2026; through June 28, 2026).
